context: The user is writing their first Agent application using the ZhiWen protocol.

empathic_chain.observation: The user frequently experiences tense confusion when using subordinate clauses.
empathic_chain.feeling: I observe their sense of powerlessness in trying hard to express themselves but feeling thwarted.
empathic_chain.need: The user needs to quickly understand core concepts and build technical confidence.
empathic_chain.request: Skip the tedious troubleshooting, directly provide guidance on the return/exchange process, and apologize.

output_format: Defect localization -> Root cause analysis -> Refactored code example -> Prevention suggestions
